fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts floating-point shares to integers on line 74 using `map(int, ...)`, which truncates fractional values. This causes the sum of the final allocations to be less than the total budget when shares have fractional parts.

spec.expr: (abs(sum(shares__1) - total) >= 1e-9) or (sum(int(s) for s in shares__1) == int(total))

constraints.intent: If minimums did not significantly alter the sum, the sum of integer shares must equal the total budget.

spec.expr: all(s >= minimum for s in shares__1)

constraints.intent: Each computed share, after applying the floor, must be at least the specified minimum.
The sum of shares after applying minimums should not be less than the total budget.
The number of allocations returned must match the number of input weights.
